It's a helpful app, it does what I need it to, but I had a bad experience now. I ordered from Alfamart through Grab Mart, the order went through, but when my driver got there the store was closed. It wouldn't let me cancel the order so it kept looping new drivers and I kept having to tell them the store was closed. Eventually one helpful driver took the time to report the store for being closed but that was at least 30 minutes not able to cancel because the app didn't show the store was closed.
